message:
feat(fnx-python): expose CGSE API to Python

- Add cgse.rs module with PyTieBreakPolicy and PyComplexityWitness classes
- Add algorithm_policy(), policy_registry(), reference_algorithms() functions
- Wire up as _fnx.cgse submodule
- Add fnx-cgse and hex dependencies

br-franken_networkx-k34r: C9 Public CGSE API for Python

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
